name: Templater
author: silentvoid13
description: Create and use dynamic templates.

name: Dataview
author: blacksmithgu
description: Run advanced queries over your vault.

name: Tag Wrangler
author: pjeby
description: Rename, merge, toggle, and search tags from the tag pane.

name: Various Complements
author: tadashi-aikawa
description: Complete words similar to auto-completion in an IDE.

name: Tasks
author: obsidian-tasks-group
description: Track tasks across your vault. Supports due dates, recurring tasks, done dates, sub-set of checklist items, and filtering. Maintained by Clare Macrae and Ilyas Landikov, created by Martin Schenck.

name: Linter
author: platers
description: Format and style your notes. Linter can be used to format YAML tags, aliases, arrays, and metadata; footnotes; headings; spacing; math blocks; regular Markdown contents like list, italics, and bold styles; and more with the use of custom rule options.

name: Auto Note Mover
author: farux
description: Automatically move the active notes to their respective folders according to rules you set.

name: Big Calendar
author: quorafind
description: A big calendar for Obsidian. All events from your daily notes OR tasks used TASKS/DATAVIEW/KANBAN format.

name: Heatmap Calendar
author: richardsl
description: Activity Year Overview for DataviewJS, Github style – Track Goals, Progress, Habits, Tasks, Exercise, Finances, "Dont Break the Chain" etc.

name: Omnisearch
author: Simon Cambier
description: Intelligent search for your notes, PDFs, and OCR for images.

name: Release Timeline
author: cakechaser
description: Release timeline rendered based on notes metadata with a Dataview-like syntax.

name: Metadata Menu
author: mdelobelle
description: For data quality enthusiasts and Dataview users: access and manage the metadata of your notes.

name: File Cooker
author: ivaneye
description: Deal batch notes from search results,current file, or Dataview query string.

name: Better Inline Fields
author: dsarman
description: Enhance Dataview-style inline fields.

name: Double Colon Conceal
author: msrch
description: Display double colon (i.e. Dataview inline fields) as a single colon for more natural reading experience.

name: Habit Calendar
author: hedonihilist
description: Monthly Habit Calendar for DataviewJS. Render a calendar inside DataviewJS code block, showing your habit status within a month.

name: Meld Build
author: meld-cp
description: Write and execute (sandboxed) JavaScript to render templates, query DataView and create dynamic notes.

name: Time Ruler
author: j-palindrome
description: A drag-and-drop time ruler combining the best of a task list and a calendar view (integrates with Tasks, Full Calendar, and Dataview).

name: ICS
author: open-horizon-labs
description: Add events from calendar ics on the web to daily notes on demand. Includes vdir support. Daily Planner, Templater and Dataview friendly.

name: Moviegrabber
author: superschnizel
description: Grab movie data from public APIs and transform it into notes that can be used with dataview and properties.

name: Run
author: hananoshikayomaru
description: Generate Markdown from dataview query and JavaScript.

name: Desk
author: davidlandry93
description: A desk to see notes at a glance. Requires Dataview.

name: AI for Templater
author: tfthacker
description: AI Extension for the Templater plugin with the OpenAI Client Library.

name: Dataview Publisher
author: udus122
description: Output markdown from your Dataview queries and keep them up to date. You can also publish them.

name: Dataview Serializer
author: Sébastien Dubois
description: Serialize Dataview queries to Markdown, and keep the Markdown representation up to date

name: Todoist Context Bridge
author: wenlzhang
description: Bridge your note-taking and Todoist task management workflows with contextual connections. Seamlessly integrate with Dataview and Tasks plugins.

name: Dataview Autocompletion
author: dnlbauer
description: Adds autocompletion to Dataview metadata fields

name: QueryDash
author: liufree
description: Add new views and enhanced features for bases. Inspired by Dataview and bases, this includes search, sorting, and pagination functionalities similar to Notion.

name: DataCards
author: sophokles187
description: Transform Dataview query results into visually appealing, customizable card layouts.

name: Virtual Content
author: signynt
description: Display markdown text (including dataview queries or Bases) at the bottom, top or in the sidebar for all notes which match a specified rule, without modifying them.

name: Dataview to Properties
author: Mara
description: Automagically copy dataview inline field (and their values, even calculated!) into frontmatter properties and keep them sync.

name: Move Cursor On Startup
author: treadder
description: Move cursor right then left briefly on startup --> first opened note. Makes DataView expressions 'activate' automatically instead of waiting for user interaction.

name: Workout Logger
author: viscosenpai
description: Log weight training sessions to notes in a Dataview-friendly format. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Activity Graph
author: rwyattwalker
description: Render activity heatmaps from Dataview query results. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Dropdown Vars
author: majid-khonji
description: Dropdowns in Reading and Live Preview; sync to frontmatter or inline Dataview. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Dataview Toggle
author: p1tt1
description: Toggle Dataview auto-refresh on/off from the status bar or command palette. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Alchemist
author: ksawl
description: Modular super-plugin for TextBundle, Audio conversion, and Dataview exports. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Embedded-Omnisearch
author: Fozi
description: Inline search UI powered by Omnisearch, with configurable page size, highlight color, and highlight opacity. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Jira Weaver
author: HJ
description: Sync Jira issues into your vault and weave them into your knowledge graph via wiki-links, Frontmatter, and Dataview. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Gantt Calendar
author: Sugar
description: A powerful visual task management plugin. Visualize and manage tasks created by the Tasks plugin, supporting both emoji and Dataview task formats. Support Feishu Task syncing. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Annotation Manager
author: Josh
description: Annotate text inline with {={id}text=} syntax, view all annotations in a sidebar, and query them via Dataview. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Bases Buttons
author: Imed Ghomari
description: Adds configurable Templater-powered buttons to Obsidian Bases. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Stardust Importer
author: Sonophage
description: Pulls watched movies (Trakt) and full-album listens (Last.fm) into reference notes via Templater. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Deck
author: Yuto Takagi
description: Draggable widget-grid dashboards that combine tasks, Dataview queries, Bases, notes, calendar, and mail. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Text Generator
author: nhaouari
description: Generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).

name: Smart Connections
author: 🌴 Brian
description: Find related notes and excerpts while writing. Your AI link building copilot displays relevant content in graph + list view. A local embedding model powers semantic search. Zero setup. No API key.

name: Companion
author: rizerphe
description: Autocomplete with AI, including ChatGPT, through a copilot-like interface.

name: AI Assistant
author: qgrail
description: Chat with OpenAI and Anthropic models or run prompt-based edits directly from notes.

name: Copilot
author: Logan Yang
description: Your AI Copilot: Chat with Your Second Brain, Learn Faster, Work Smarter.

name: Copilot auto completion
author: j0rd1smit
description: A highly configurable copilot-like auto-completion using the ChatGPT API.

name: Local GPT
author: pfrankov
description: Local Ollama and OpenAI-like GPT's assistance for maximum privacy and offline access.

name: GitHub Copilot
author: pierrad
description: Implement suggestions from Github Copilot directly in your editor.

name: Ayanite
author: jemstelos
description: An integrated thinking environment - advanced AI chat and knowledge copilot (Closed source).

name: Smart Connections Visualizer
author: mossy1022
description: View your Smart Connections in a visualized format.

name: Monokakido Copilot
author: noheartpen
description: During editing, simply double-press the option key to search with the Dictionaries by Monokakido.

name: AI Companion
author: kowshik24
description: AI companion accessible with /ai command in notes. Supports OpenAI integration.

name: AI Copilot
author: alexjiaguo
description: Your intelligent writing and thinking assistant. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: GitHub Copilot Integration
author: go2engle
description: Integrate GitHub Copilot for AI-powered text generation and assistance. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: ima.copilot Sync
author: chenxiccc
description: Sync ima notes & knowledge-base to Obsidian - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Vault Operator
author: Sebastian Hanke
description: Real AI agent for your vault. Coworker, Copilot & thinking partner, that maintains your memory & knowledge, adapts to your workflows, uses plugins, skills & tools with full safety controls. BYOK & MCP - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Superpower Inside
author: Superpower Inside Team
description: Desktop AI copilot for Obsidian with LLM chat, RAG, MCP tools, and source-aware context - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Note Copilot
author: Lebenswille
description: AI copilot in the right side panel - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Language Learn
description: AI-powered language learning with word analysis, relation graphs, hover tooltips, and structured note-taking. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Copilot Auto Completion Plus
author: Daniil Shipilov
description: Adds configurable AI auto-completion to Obsidian using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Azure OpenAI, or Ollama. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Copilot Personal
author: Josef
description: AI agent with 17 tools, multi-provider LLM (11 providers), RAG semantic search, PDF extraction, web search, and autonomous note creation. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Find orphaned files and broken links
author: Vinzent
description: Find files that are not linked anywhere and would otherwise be lost in your vault. In other words: files with no backlinks.

name: Dangling links
author: graydon
description: Add a sidebar showing any dangling links in a vault. Dangling links are orphaned links that don't point to anything in the vault.

name: Consistent Attachments and Links
author: dy-sh
description: Move note attachments and update links automatically.

name: Metadata Extractor
author: kometenstaub
description: Metadata export (on a schedule) for integration with third-party apps like launchers or graph analysis software.

name: Link Converter
author: ozntel
description: Scan all your links in the vault and convert them to your desired format.

name: Nuke Orphans
author: sandorex
description: Trash orphaned files and attachments.

name: Janitor
author: canna71
description: Perform cleanup tasks on your vault.

name: Broken Links
author: ipshing
description: Find broken links in your vault that don't connect to notes.

name: Find Orphaned Images
author: josmarcristello
description: Finds images in the vault that are not linked to any notes. Either lists, or deletes them.

name: MOC Link Helper
author: bogdancodreanu
description: Helps with some MOC janitor-linking tasks.

name: Random broken link
author: jantatesa
description: Expand your knowledge by visiting random broken links.

name: File Commander
author: fengshuzi
description: Batch file operations - select, delete, move, tag, rename images, find broken links and orphan notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Vault Plus
author: jabaho9523
description: Vault health dashboard — orphans, broken links, empty and oversized notes, duplicates, unused tags, unreferenced attachments — with one-click fixes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Vault Inspector
author: rogerdigital
description: Scan your vault for maintenance problems: broken links, orphan attachments, duplicate files, frontmatter inconsistencies, unused tags, and large files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Vault Cleanup Dashboard
author: lunan
description: Visual dashboard for intelligently cleaning orphaned files and attachments with scheduled auto-cleanup and file protection. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Consistent Attachments
author: Lars Bücker
description: Keep attachment locations consistent when notes are moved. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
